content: Walker's custom-menu system (via its Elephant backend) lets users define menus as Lua scripts in ~/.config/elephant/menus/ with Name/Icon/Action/GetEntries(), triggered by prefix characters configured in walker/config.toml (e.g. '.' files, ':' emoji, '=' calculator, '$' clipboard, custom '!' '?' etc). Omarchy binds Walker to app launcher, system menu, power menu, and keybind viewer via separate Hyprland keybinds rather than one mega-menu, each just a differently-invoked Walker mode/theme.
